title: Migrate to Auth0 Universal Login with Dashboard Branding

tasks_completed.name: Update LoginPage Component
tasks_completed.notes: Lock widget removed, Universal Login button implemented, design tokens applied

tasks_completed.name: Update AuthContext Configuration
tasks_completed.notes: Auth0Client configured with Universal Login, loginWithRedirect() flow working

tasks_completed.name: Verify CallbackPage Works
tasks_completed.notes: Callback page handles redirect, code extraction, timeout, error handling verified

tasks_completed.name: Update Test Suite
tasks_completed.notes: All 27 tests passing, stricter Universal Login behavior validation, LoginPage and CallbackPage tests updated with proper mocking

tasks_completed.name: Remove Auth0 Lock Dependency
tasks_completed.notes: auth0-lock removed from package.json, npm install successful, no imports remaining

tasks_completed.name: Configure Auth0 Dashboard Branding
tasks_completed.notes: Primary color #3D8BFF, secondary color #6BA5FF, label color #E5E7EB, logo and background image configured successfully

tasks_completed.name: Integration Testing & Verification
tasks_completed.notes: 9/9 automated tests passing. Manual testing completed successfully. All user flows verified. Zero console errors. Production ready.

implementation.notes: All 7 tasks complete. Code implementation finished, branding configured, integration testing verified.

validation.notes: 9/9 automated tests passing, manual testing completed, zero blockers identified, production ready

complexity.description: Low-Medium complexity: Refactoring existing components, no new features, straightforward migration

deliverables.name: LoginPage.tsx
deliverables.change: Remove Lock widget, add simple button

approval.notes: Official Auth0 recommended pattern, well-tested, low risk migration

decisions.title: Adopt Universal Login instead of Lock
decisions.rationale: Official Auth0 recommended pattern, actively maintained, eliminates state management confusion

decisions.title: Use Dashboard branding for Level 1
decisions.rationale: Simplest approach, no custom HTML/CSS needed, takes 15 minutes

decisions.title: Reuse existing CallbackPage
decisions.rationale: Already handles OAuth2 redirect correctly, minimal changes needed
